name: Patient 49
history: History of complex, strained family relationships. Father creates misery for others and expresses life dissatisfaction. Maternal grandmother negatively impacted family, especially mother.
intermediate_belief: My family's dysfunction imposes obligations I don't want to fulfill.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm burdened by my family's legacy of misery and obligation.
coping_strategies: Contemplation of family responsibilities, processing complex family dynamics.
situation: Contemplating father's wishes for burial in Nepal and the responsibilities involved.
auto_thought: Even in death, my father's demands are complicated and burdensome.
